testcase.name: Employee submits a valid leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee submits a valid leave request &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:7&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits an annual leave request from "future date" to "future date"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe request includes a valid reason&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe leave request status is "Pending"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Employee submits without filling all required fields
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee submits without filling all required fields &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:13&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits a leave request without a reason&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe system displays the error "Request cannot be created without a reason"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Employee submits with invalid leave type
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee submits with invalid leave type &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:18&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits a leave request with type "INVALID_LEAVE_TYPE"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe system displays the error "Invalid leave type"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Employee submits overlapping with another request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee submits overlapping with another request &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:23&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee has sufficient leave balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits a leave request overlapping with an existing request&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe system displays the error "Leave request overlaps with an existing request"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Employee submits with insufficient balance
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee submits with insufficient balance &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:28&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee has zero balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits an annual leave request from "future date" to "future date"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe system displays the error "Insufficient leave balance"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Unauthorized employee attempts to create request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Unauthorized employee attempts to create request &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:33&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee does not have valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee tries to submit a leave request&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe system blocks the action&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Employee submits with different boundary conditions
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee submits with different boundary conditions &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:97&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits a leave request from "value" to "value"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe status is "value"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Employee submits with different date ranges &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:44&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits a leave request from "future date" to "future date"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe status is "Pending"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Employee submits with different leave types &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:54&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits a "ANNUAL_LEAVE" leave request from "future date" to "future date"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe status is "Pending"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Employee submits with different period types &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:65&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits a leave request with period type "JOURNEE_COMPLETE" from "future date" to "future date"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe status is "Pending"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Employee submits with different balances &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:77&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee has "zero" balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits a leave request from "future date" to "future date"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe system displays the error "Insufficient leave balance"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Employee submits with different notice periods &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:86&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits a leave request less than "48" hours before start date&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe system displays the error "Request must respect the notice period"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Employee submits with different day counts &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:94&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits a leave request with "zero" days&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe system displays the error "Request cannot be created with zero days"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Employee submits with different date ranges &amp#27;[90m# features/auth-leave_01_leave-request-lifecycle_20260327_142238.feature:45&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe Employee logs in with valid credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe Employee submits a leave request from "future date" to "future date"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe status is "Rejected"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Example #1.2
